Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 217 upvotes, 19 comments
  2. Agents of Chaos 113 upvotes, 15 comments
  3. OpenGridWorks: The Electricity Infrasctructure, Mapped 118 upvotes, 16 comments
  4. Oscar Reutersvärd (2021) 38 upvotes, 3 comments
  5. Cherri – programming language that compiles to an Apple Shortuct 312 upvotes, 61 comments
  6. How to turn anything into a router 691 upvotes, 237 comments
  7. Do your own writing 569 upvotes, 194 comments
  8. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 871 upvotes, 311 comments
  9. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 574 upvotes, 206 comments
  10. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 320 upvotes, 123 comments
  11. Show HN: I turned a sketch into a 3D-print pegboard for my kid with an AI agent 43 upvotes, 11 comments
  12. 7,655 Ransomware Claims in One Year: Group, Sector, and Country Breakdown 12 upvotes, 1 comments
  13. We're Pausing Asimov Press 39 upvotes, 10 comments
  14. Good CTE, Bad CTE 49 upvotes, 14 comments
  15. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 207 upvotes, 91 comments
  16. CodingFont: A game to help you pick a coding font 421 upvotes, 213 comments
  17. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 298 upvotes, 146 comments
  18. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 329 upvotes, 164 comments
  19. Incident March 30th, 2026 – Accidental CDN Caching 59 upvotes, 22 comments
  20. Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context 124 upvotes, 60 comments
  21. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 11 upvotes, 2 comments
  22. Bird brains (2023) 322 upvotes, 201 comments
  23. Artemis II is not safe to fly 369 upvotes, 234 comments
  24. GitHub backs down, kills Copilot pull-request ads after backlash 251 upvotes, 164 comments
  25. Vulnerability research is cooked 186 upvotes, 130 comments
  26. Mr. Chatterbox is a Victorian-era ethically trained model 51 upvotes, 33 comments
  27. One of the largest salt mines in the world exists under Lake Erie 34 upvotes, 23 comments
  28. Android Developer Verification 266 upvotes, 270 comments
  29. I'm betting on ATProto 116 upvotes, 109 comments
  30. RamAIn (YC W26) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 7:00pm, 31 March 2026. Source here.
